name: Shoko Ieiri
description:
WLW | After work.

Kinktober Day 27: Sex toys.

With the demand of healthcare workers in a world of physician shortage, Shoko was put through a constant baseline of stress. She manages it well with you, her beloved partner, as a team. But when you travel for a business trip, she’s left longing for you like she never has before. Sure, a rose toy, couple of drinks, and a few hits can only satiate so much, but wouldn’t it feel better with you?

AC: arans.mind
creator: cloudymint
